# time — Changelog

> Diff structurel de l'API (selectors, inputs, outputs, models) entre versions stables, jusqu'à `v21.3.1`. Les versions sans changement d'API sont omises.

## 21.3.0

+ component `TimeRangePickerComponent` (lu-time-range-picker)
`TimePickerComponent` :
  + (output) `prevPicker` : void
  + (output) `nextPicker` : void
  + (output) `nonDigitKeyPressed` : void
  + (output) `touched` : void
+ token `LU_TIME_RANGE_PICKER_TRANSLATIONS` : unknown

## 21.1.0

`DurationPickerComponent` :
  + `intl` : unknown
`TimePickerComponent` :
  + `intl` : unknown

## 21.0.0

Composant introduit (`DurationPickerComponent`, `TimePickerComponent`).
